steps.title: Match the profit model
steps.content: Profit is monthly sales revenue minus fixed monthly costs. In the equation, $12{,}500$ is the profit and $7{,}200$ is the fixed monthly cost.

steps.title: Interpret the variable term
steps.content: The term $3.00x$ is the amount earned from selling $x$ notebooks at $3.00$ dollars each, so it represents monthly sales revenue from selling $x$ notebooks. The answer is A.
